title: Balancing the Scales of Artificial Neural Networks
description: A balanced scale diagram visually comparing the key advantages and disadvantages of using Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs).
relationships: The 'ANN Model' acts as the central pivot point. The 'Advantages Scale Tray' and 'Disadvantages Scale Tray' are balanced against each other, showing how the pros and cons must be weighed for a given application.
